body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v2/archives/contract/attachment/upload 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v2/archives/contract/attachment/upload 
 ## 接口描述 
为新增/编辑合同准备，优先上传合同附件信息，获取附件的唯一ID和编码 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: form-data 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"FILE","name":"file","label":"%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E7%9A%84%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"d1384b32d6994edfbeeacb236d7ba9da_IMAGE.png","required":true,"maxLength":"","desc":"%20%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%E5%A4%A7%E5%B0%8F%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%8750M"}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"EMPNUMBER","required":true,"maxLength":"150","label":"%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E7%9A%84%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"00210416"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"body","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点","required":true},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"body","required":true,"label":"%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BD%93","exampleValue":"","desc":"","maxLength":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"seqId","required":true,"label":"%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80ID%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"33238","desc":"","maxLength":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"fileName","required":true,"label":"%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"4d88e028-b997-40e9-912a-fd56bbda457a","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"fileShowName","required":true,"label":"%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E5%8E%9F%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"d1384b32d6994edfbeeacb236d7ba9da_IMAGE.png","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":true,"label":"%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","required":true,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SUC0000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":true,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%09","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":true,"label":"%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%09","exampleValue":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":""}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 #### 请求报文
```json
{"file":[文件请求体]}
```
#### 响应报文
```json
{
    "body": {
        "seqId": 33238,
        "fileName": "4d88e028-b997-40e9-912a-fd56bbda457a",
        "fileShowName": "d1384b32d6994edfbeeacb236d7ba9da_IMAGE.png",
        "success": true
    },
    "returnCode": "SUC0000",
    "success": true,
    "message": "成功"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|
  | --- | --- |
|E0001	|具体业务异常提示|
  | E0003| 业务执行错误|
  | EROOR1| 系统错误|
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v2/archives/contract/attachment/upload

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v2/archives/contract/attachment/upload

接口描述

为新增/编辑合同准备，优先上传合同附件信息，获取附件的唯一ID和编码

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: FORM-DATA

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"FILE","name":"file","label":"%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E7%9A%84%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"d1384b32d6994edfbeeacb236d7ba9da_IMAGE.png","required":true,"maxLength":"","desc":"%20%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%E5%A4%A7%E5%B0%8F%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%8750M"}}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"EMPNUMBER","required":true,"maxLength":"150","label":"%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E7%9A%84%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"00210416"}}]}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"body","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点","required":true},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"body","required":true,"label":"%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BD%93","exampleValue":"","desc":"","maxLength":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"seqId","required":true,"label":"%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80ID%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"33238","desc":"","maxLength":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"fileName","required":true,"label":"%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"4d88e028-b997-40e9-912a-fd56bbda457a","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"fileShowName","required":true,"label":"%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E5%8E%9F%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"d1384b32d6994edfbeeacb236d7ba9da_IMAGE.png","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":true,"label":"%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","required":true,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SUC0000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":true,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%09","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":true,"label":"%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%09","exampleValue":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":""}}]}]}

接口调用示例

请求报文

{"file":[文件请求体]}

响应报文

{
    "body": {
        "seqId": 33238,
        "fileName": "4d88e028-b997-40e9-912a-fd56bbda457a",
        "fileShowName": "d1384b32d6994edfbeeacb236d7ba9da_IMAGE.png",
        "success": true
    },
    "returnCode": "SUC0000",
    "success": true,
    "message": "成功"
}

错误码说明

错误码 错误信息
E0001 具体业务异常提示
E0003 业务执行错误
EROOR1 系统错误
